pageProps.content:
**Role**: Financial Analysis & Solvency Modeling  
**Timeframe**: 03/2026 – 04/2026  
**Links**: [Dashboard](https://phantichtcdn-wane-hieu.streamlit.app/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/wane-bs/phantichtcdn)

**Challenge**
Vietnam Airlines (HVN) faced complex financial risks following macroeconomic fluctuations. The core challenge was to accurately measure and monitor liquidity and bankruptcy risks using a comprehensive analytical tool, rather than relying on fragmented financial reports.

**Solution**
- **Quantitative Assessment & Modeling**: Applied advanced financial models (Altman Z''-Score, Beneish M-Score) to identify earnings manipulation and bankruptcy risks. Formulated a "Liquidity Runway" framework to measure the survival capacity under severe cash depletion scenarios.
- **Valuation & Stress Testing**: Executed corporate valuation utilizing DCF and EV Multiples methods. Integrated macroeconomic Stress Testing to evaluate sensitivity to FX exchange rates and fuel costs, seamlessly deployed as an interactive Web App via Python Streamlit.

**Impact**
The intuitive Dashboard successfully processed and analyzed 15 years of historical financial data (2011-2025). The tool established a highly responsive Early Warning System regarding financial health, serving as a vital asset for investors and management in executing strategic restructuring decisions.
